name: ethanhq
description: Ethan Guo's Claude Code plugins — currently cc-fleet (provider LLM teammates / subagents).

plugins.name: cc-fleet
plugins.description: Spawn any third-party LLM provider with an Anthropic-compatible API as real Claude Code agent-team teammates or one-shot subagents via the cc-fleet CLI — driven just like native teammates; your main session's own auth (OAuth or API key) is untouched, provider workers bill the provider key.
